title: Reading to Apply a Diagram
instructions: Read the following email message about the diagram. Complete the email by filling in the blanks. Select the best choice for each blank from the drop-down menu.

sections.content:
Subject: Halifax Hotels
To: Mary Kaczinski <kaczinski@lightmail.bc.ca>
From: Beth Middleton <b.middleton@sterlings.ca>

Hi Mary,

I went online and found a few options for our three-night stay in Halifax. The cheapest is The Affordable Inn. It's __DROPDOWN_1__ There's no restaurant or room service. But really, why would we even consider The Affordable Inn when __DROPDOWN_2__ is only a little more expensive, right downtown, and only opened this year. Then again, the __DROPDOWN_3__ is probably the most luxurious. It's certainly got a luxury price tag (for Halifax anyway). The website gave it the highest rating of the four hotels listed, which is probably a good sign.

Note that all the listed hotels have __DROPDOWN_4__ and also internet. Funnily enough, The Brooke Suites doesn't __DROPDOWN_5__ but I can hardly imagine you'll miss that too much when visiting Halifax in the winter.

Let me know what you think.
Beth

sections.instruction_text: Using the drop-down menu, choose the best option.

options: selling a hotel package to Mary.
arranging for Mary to visit her.
planning to visit Mary in Halifax.
